opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My joints are completely locked, I feel feverish and exhausted, and the pain is driving me to tears.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My hands and feet flared badly over a day after a cold, and I can't walk safely — my spouse is helping me.

symptom_narrative.onset: escalated over 24 hours after a mild viral illness
symptom_narrative.character: locked, swollen small joints of hands and feet, feeling feverish and drained
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: in tears with pain; feet feel like walking on glass
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: knuckles and finger joints, and the balls of my feet (both sides)
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: morning stiffness over 3 hours; flared after a cold
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feverish, exhausted, and can't walk safely
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I was recently diagnosed with seropositive RA and this is a bad flare

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: my spouse is helping me move; I can't walk safely

communication_style.typical_message_style: tearful, clear about pain and immobility; spouse assists

objective_data_offered.value: knuckles and toes look symmetrically swollen; no single bright-red hot joint
I can't put weight on my feet without agony
